description: Regression coverage for plan-approval handoff: after a create-tasks plan is approved, the foreground orchestrator must stop and let the planned build/verification follow-up own the workflow work exactly once.

conversation.text: First create a structured plan approval card/task checklist and wait for my approval before building. Do not use a plain text plan and do not skip the plan approval step. After I approve the plan card, build a workflow that runs every weekday at 9am and posts "Plan handoff check passed" to Slack #handoff-check. After saving, verify the workflow automatically.

processExpectations: The agent used the structured plan approval flow before building: the transcript includes a create-tasks tool call or Plan interaction, the conversation metrics show a plan-review confirmation request, and no workflow was built before that plan-review was approved. A plain text plan with no create-tasks/plan-review confirmation does not satisfy this expectation.

After the structured plan was approved, the single workflow build was owned by the planned build follow-up. The transcript does not show the foreground orchestrator building the requested workflow inline and then a second planned-task follow-up building the same workflow again.
The agent ran automatic verification after the planned build, and it did not use verification failure or follow-up scheduling as a reason to rebuild the same workflow a second time.
outcomeExpectations: The final workflow has a weekday 9am schedule trigger and posts the exact message "Plan handoff check passed" to Slack #handoff-check.

executionScenarios.name: weekday-slack-post
executionScenarios.description: The scheduled workflow posts the handoff check message to Slack.
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The Slack postMessage/send-message node posts to #handoff-check and returns a successful response with ok=true and a message timestamp.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors and the Slack node posts the exact text "Plan handoff check passed" to #handoff-check. There is only one Slack posting action in the workflow.
